title: Phase 32.4 — Sitemap Composition Audit

tools.description: Noindexed compound-interest, mortgage, and loan variant pages. Should NOT be in sitemap.

calculators.description: Core calculator pages — these are the site's primary content engine

guides.description: 'How to use X' guide pages. Thin, templated, noindexed.

blog.description: Blog posts — top impression driver (149 imp for $20K loan blog)

decisions.description: Financial decision guides (pay off debt or invest, etc.)

scenarios.description: Phase 32 hand-crafted loan scenario pages — the future growth engine

other.description: Static pages (privacy, terms, about, etc.), homepage

bloat_analysis.reason: 53.8% of sitemap URLs are low-value or noindexed programmatic pages (tools, guides). These dilute crawl budget, create noise in GSC reports, and potentially signal low-quality to Google. The sitemap should be pruned to only include intentionally indexable, quality-gated pages.

recommendation: Prune sitemap to exclude tools and guides that are noindexed. This will reduce sitemap bloat by ~53%, focus crawl budget on high-value pages, and clean up GSC reporting.
